app/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the migration target.
app/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 language features, failing to utilize or validate Java 21 syntax and APIs.

app/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a snapshot release compatible with Java 21.
app/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling Java 21 source code or may lack necessary fixes for newer JDKs.
